personalInfo.name: Fredrick George F
personalInfo.title: Backend Developer & Data Science
personalInfo.subtitle: CS Undergraduate • Backend Developer
personalInfo.description: Innovative Computer Science undergraduate specializing in rigorous Backend Architecture and Data Science. Engineering strictly layered, ACID-compliant systems prioritizing SOLID principles, clean separation of concerns, and maintainability.

about.heading: Backend Developer passionate about clean architecture and scalable systems
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science undergraduate at New Horizon College of Engineering with a CGPA of 8.88/10.0, specializing in Data Science and Backend Development.

My approach combines deep technical expertise in SOLID principles, ACID transactions, and layered architecture with a passion for structured software engineering and disciplined debugging over feature-driven coding.
I focus on building enterprise-grade systems with clean separation of concerns, ensuring every line of code is maintainable, scalable, and follows industry best practices.

projects.title: Enterprise Student Management System
description: Architected a strictly layered backend to master enterprise system design, enforcing SOLID principles and pure JDBC for manual ACID transaction control
Integrated SLF4J for systematic debugging and Springdoc OpenAPI for comprehensive architectural documentation

projects.title: PlacementPulse
description: Developed a Next.js and Supabase interview prep app, integrating Gemini AI to autonomously generate daily, dynamic problem sets (DSA, Aptitude, Core CS)
Engineered a mobile-first UI with centralized state gamification and custom concurrency guards to resolve touch conflicts between swipe and scroll events

projects.title: Farm2Biz B2B Marketplace
description: Built a B2B platform with RESTful APIs to streamline agricultural supply chains, manage dynamic order routing, and facilitate secure transactions
Empowered local farmers to achieve higher profit margins by bypassing middlemen and connecting directly with commercial buyers via a custom dashboard

projects.title: QR-Auth System
description: Architected a real-time, passwordless login flow using WebSockets and JWT for secure cross-device token validation, eliminating static credential risks

achievements.title: Hackathon Finalist
achievements.description: Top finalist in a national-level coding hackathon for designing a scalable solution in data analytics

achievements.title: Innovation Ambassador
achievements.description: Completed 30 hours of formal training in design thinking and the innovation lifecycle

achievements.title: Generative AI Studio
achievements.description: Industry-aligned certification in Generative AI technologies and applications

footer.description: CS Undergraduate specializing in Backend Architecture and Data Science. Building enterprise-grade systems with clean code and structured engineering principles.
